title: Can the API pull photos for use in other applications?

posts.author: Babu240 (Charles Watson)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re VERY new to Monday and evaluating Monday for a slightly weird use case - antiques collection management. We are running a free trial and have a board with the inventory of 1200 objects and one of the columns is files with a photo of the object for the row of the inventory. We need to pull that photo to our website through the API along with other information about each antique object. Can the API pull photos from a file column in a board?
